name: Lime Cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the JELL-O mixture using boiling water and cold water according to package instructions.
2. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square pan.
3. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until firm.
4. Cut the JELL-O into cubes.
5. Spoon the cubes into four dessert glasses and serve.
